calls.content:
### Work Breakdown Structure
- Site Preparation
  - Mobilization and site setup (2 crew days)
  - Temporary fencing and signage (1 crew day)
  - Minor grading and leveling (2 crew days)
- Foundations
  - Excavation for foundations (2 crew days)
  - Formwork and reinforcement (3 crew days)
  - Concrete pour and curing (3 crew days)
- Structural Shell
  - External and internal wall construction (6 crew days)
  - Roof framing and installation (4 crew days)
  - Roof waterproofing and insulation (2 crew days)
- Exterior Finishes
  - Window and door installation (2 crew days)
  - Exterior cladding and painting (3 crew days)
- Interior Construction
  - Partition walls and drywall (3 crew days)
  - Flooring installation (3 crew days)
  - Ceiling installation (2 crew days)
- Building Systems
  - Electrical rough-in and finish (4 crew days)
  - Plumbing rough-in and finish (4 crew days)
  - HVAC installation (3 crew days)
- Interior Finishes
  - Painting and wall finishes (3 crew days)
  - Millwork and shelving installation (3 crew days)
  - Fixtures and hardware installation (2 crew days)
- Site Works and Landscaping
  - Sidewalks and paving (2 crew days)
  - Landscaping and planting (2 crew days)
  - Site cleanup and demobilization (1 crew day)

### Total Estimate
60 crew days

### Assumptions
- Crew day = 1 standard crew (4-6 workers) working a full day.
- All materials are readily available and delivered on schedule.
- No major weather delays or site access issues.
- Subcontractors are scheduled efficiently and overlap where possible.
- Design drawings are fully approved and require no changes.
- The site is already cleared and utilities are available at the boundary.
- Library is a single storey, standard construction, no unusual features.
